title: North Korea Test-Fires Cluster-Bomb Ballistic Missiles
summary: North Korea launched multiple short-range ballistic missiles with cluster bomb warheads under Kim Jong-un's supervision to evaluate their power.
contents:
## North Korea Test-Fires Cluster-Bomb Ballistic Missiles

### Overview
North Korea launched multiple short-range ballistic missiles with cluster bomb warheads under Kim Jong-un's supervision to evaluate their power.

### Details
North Korea fired five tactical ballistic missiles of the improved Hwasongpho-11 Ra type toward a target 136 km away, striking a 12.5-13 hectare area with high density. Kim Jong-un oversaw the test and noted cluster bomb warheads boost high-density striking capability against specific targets. South Korea detected the launches into the East Sea, with missiles flying about 140 km, and maintains a firm defense posture.

### Geographic context
Location: North Korea.
